name: Deviazione Standard
description: Calcola la deviazione standard di un dataset.
seo_description: Calcola la deviazione standard di un dataset. Calcolatore gratuito, preciso e istantaneo Usato da professionisti e studenti in tutto il mondo.
example_label: Calculate the standard deviation of the dataset: 12.5, 15.3, 14.8, 11.2, 16.7, 13.9.
result_context: Standard deviation {sd} measures data spread; mean is {mean} with n={n} values.
steps: Find squared deviations from mean and sum them
Divide by (n-1)=5 and take square root
mistakes: Using population formula (÷n) instead of sample formula (÷n-1)
Not having enough data points (need at least 2)
